metadata.description: okfm (OKF Manager): build and maintain an Open Knowledge Format knowledge base from Claude Code — a directory of markdown + YAML frontmatter readable by humans and any AI agent, with no SDK or server.

plugins.name: okfm
plugins.description: Build and maintain Open Knowledge Format (OKF) knowledge bases — directories of markdown + YAML frontmatter readable by humans and any AI agent, with no SDK or server. Dependency-free stdlib Python 3 engine that never overwrites your files without a preview. Authoring & upkeep: start, new, add, move, check (with a preview-gated --fix), and map (a self-contained offline browser with a needs-attention lens). Ingestion: convert, scan, find. Producing: seed (SQLite / OpenAPI-JSON-Schema / directory-tree) and enrich (bounded web sourcing under a required allowlist and page cap). Nested index.md tree + log.md owned by the engine; every write previews first.
